statusLine.command: input=$(cat); current_dir=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); output_style=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.output_style.name'); session_id=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.session_id' | cut -c1-8); cd "$current_dir" 2>/dev/null || true; git_branch=$(git symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo 'no-git'); git_status=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); dir_name=$(basename "$current_dir"); printf '\033[36m%s\033[0m \033[35mon\033[0m \033[33m%s\033[0m \033[32m%s\033[0m%s \033[94m%s\033[0m \033[90m[%s]\033[0m' "$dir_name" "$git_branch" "$git_status" "$([[ $git_status -gt 0 ]] && echo ' ±' || echo '')" "$model" "$session_id"
